data.title: Coinbase now lets users lend USDC onchain with current yields up to 10.8%

The service is powered by Morpho with allocations managed through onchain vaults curated by Steakhouse Financial on Base.

data.title: Pundit Shares ‘XRP Endgame’: What To Watch Out For With Ripple
data.description:
Crypto pundit Pumpius is drawing attention to what he calls the “XRP Endgame,” saying all the key pieces are falling into place for Ripple and its token. According to him, these shifts put XRP in a rare position to rise above other digital assets. Global rules and banking standards are also moving in Ripple’s favor at the same time. Pundit: Institutional Rails And Legal Clarity Cement XRP’s Role Pumpius stresses that Ripple’s victory in its long fight with the SEC is not just a legal win but a turning point
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-endgame-with-ripple/

data.title: Trump Administration Seeks Supreme Court Approval for Dismissal of Federal Reserve Governor
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Trump administration has approached the U.S. Supreme Court with a request to permit U.S. President Donald Trump to dismiss Federal Reserve Governor Cook. This move marks a significant step in the administration's efforts to exert influence over the Federal Reserve's operations.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation and Columbia University Launch Blockchain Research Center
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Ethereum Foundation and Columbia University's School of Engineering have announced the establishment of the interdisciplinary Columbia-Ethereum Blockchain Protocol Design Research Center. The Ethereum Foundation will contribute up to $6 million to support the center's development, with a commitment to donate $500,000 annually for the first three years.

data.title: A whale transferred 9,000 ETH to Binance, worth $41.56 million
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the whale/institutional address 0x395...500, which accumulated 86,001 ETH between June 22nd and August 12th, has just transferred another 9,000 ETH (worth $41.56 million) to Binance. He accumulated 86,001 ETH between June 22nd and August 12th through Binance at an average price of $3,023, and began transferring ETH to Binance three days ago to take profits. He has now transferred 15,010 ETH (worth $68.77 million) to Binance in the past three days, at an average price of $4,582.

data.title: Analysis: Fed rate cut may not reverse US economic slowdown
data.description: The U.S. Federal Reserve has announced a 25 basis point interest rate cut and continued balance sheet reduction. This is the first rate cut by the Fed since December 2024, and two more rate cuts are expected this year. Some analysts point out that one of the main considerations for the Fed's rate cut is the downward pressure from weak employment. The Fed's "dual mission" of combating inflation and maintaining employment is undergoing a fine-tuning of its focus, with stabilizing employment becoming a key priority. However, due to the continued negative impact of policies such as tariffs and immigration on business and consumer confidence, the U.S. economy may find it difficult to reverse its overall slowdown. Furthermore, the combined effects of rate cuts and tariffs could make achieving the Fed's goal of controlling inflation even more difficult. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin Rallies 2% As Analyst Outlines Q4 Ethereum, Solana, Dogecoin 'Altcoin Season' Roadmap
data.description:
As Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) edges closer to $118,000, prominent analyst Trader Mayne says the long-awaited 25-basis points interest rate cut clears the macro overhang and sets up one last Bitcoin-led push before an altcoin finale. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/25/09/47743621/bitcoin-rallies-2-as-analyst-outlines-q4-ethereum-solana-dogecoin-altcoin-season-roadmap?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Vitalik Buterin defends 43 day Ethereum staking exit queue as $11.3B waits in line, what breaks next
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has weighed in on the growing concerns over the network’s staking exit queue, which has now stretched to more than six weeks. In a Sept. 18 post on X, Buterin framed the process as a deliberate design choice rather than a flaw, comparing it to the discipline of military service. According […] The post Vitalik Buterin defends 43 day Ethereum staking exit queue as $11
source: https://cryptoslate.com/vitalik-buterin-defends-43-day-ethereum-exit-staking-queue-as-11-3b-waits-in-line-what-breaks-next/

data.title: Bank of England (BoE) keeps rates at 4% despite inflation pressures
data.description:
The BOE remains committed to reducing the UK’s inflation to its target 2%.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/boe-keeps-rates-at-4-inflation-pressures/

data.title: SBF's X account is suspected to have unusual activity, and FTT has exceeded 1 USDT.
data.description: According to X account monitoring, SBF's X account is suspected to have unusual movements, following a large number of users. Perhaps affected by this, FTT broke through 1 USDT and is now reported at 1.05 USDT, a 1-hour increase of 30%.

data.title: Russia announces new oil price formula to protect budget from sanctions and market swings
data.description:
Russia is changing how it handles oil money. On Thursday, the Finance Ministry said it plans to roll out a new oil price formula next year that would lower the cut-off price for oil revenues going into the country’s fiscal reserve fund. The goal is reportedly to protect the national budget from market swings and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-announces-new-oil-price-formula/

data.title: OKX plans to adjust the funding frequency for BARDUSDT perpetual contracts on September 19th.
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX plans to adjust the funding settlement frequency of BARDUSDT perpetual contracts on September 19, 2025. Before the adjustment, the funding settlement frequency was every 4 hours, and after the adjustment, the funding settlement frequency will be every 2 hours.

data.title: Trump: The stock market will do better over time
data.description: US President Trump said the stock market has hit a new high and will perform better over time. (Jinshi)

data.title: Titan raises $7M seed round alongside public launch of meta-DEX aggregator
data.description:
Titan’s seed round is led by Galaxy Ventures
source: https://blockworks.co/news/titan-raise-meta-dex-aggregator

data.title: Citigroup raises its price target on cryptocurrency exchange Bullish to $70 and reiterates its buy rating
data.description: Citigroup raised its target price for cryptocurrency exchange Bullish to $70 due to better-than-expected second-quarter results, strong IPO momentum, and accelerated SS&O growth. Citigroup said the long-awaited BitLicense approval from the New York Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) removed a key regulatory hurdle, boosting investor confidence. Citigroup also reiterated its buy rating, saying the company has attractive operating leverage. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Jia Yueting: The US SEC's simplified crypto ETF listing process opens the door to assets like Solana
data.description: Faraday Future founder Jia Yueting posted on the X platform that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has taken a historic step: spot cryptocurrency ETFs other than BTC/ETH now have a streamlined 75-day listing path, opening the door for assets like Solana. The regulatory framework is catching up with the strategy that forward-thinking corporate finance departments have already begun implementing: making diversified digital assets a core component of their balance sheets.

data.title: Monad launches Momentum, an incentive program, with the first round of applications set to close on September 28th
data.description: Monad announced the launch of Monad Momentum, an ecosystem incentive program, on the X platform. The first round of applications will close on September 28th. The Monad Momentum program utilizes an incentive-driven matching model, meaning project recipients participate, with teams initially investing their own resources, and Monad Momentum supplementing them.

data.title: REX-Osprey launches first of its kind spot XRP ETF tracking the third-largest cryptocurrency
data.description:
For the first time in the U. S. , an exchange-traded fund tracking the price of the third-largest cryptocurrency, XRP, has begun trading.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/370941/rex-osprey-launches-first-of-its-kind-xrp-etf-under-unique-legal-structure?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
